explanation: Substitution: Replaced the suspicious path 'C:\Temp\test_extension' with a benign lab placeholder 'C:\Lab\input\test_extension' to avoid triggering the Sigma rule while maintaining the same executable family and test intent.

Insertion: Added an additional flag '--disable-extensions' which may alter the command line parsing behavior and avoid the Sigma rule's 'CommandLine|contains' check.
